headline: A Look At Martin Marietta Materials (MLM) Valuation After Strong Results But Macro Pressures Hit Sentiment
summary: Martin Marietta Materials (MLM) has come under pressure even after reporting strong quarterly results and continuing its aggregates expansion, as rising Treasury yields, sector earnings revisions and higher diesel costs weigh on building materials stocks. See our latest analysis for Martin Marietta Materials. Despite solid operating updates, the share price has come under clear pressure, with a 30 day share price return down 12.81% and a year to date share price return down 15.44%. However,...
